title: What Boston meteorologists are saying about potential heavy rain this week
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Local News A spell of wet weather is headed for the Boston area later this week.

title: Bruins’ Nikita Zadorov gets fined after cross-checking Sabres captain Rasmus Dahlin

title: Dust devil caught on video during Rhode Island soccer game
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Local News The sudden swirl appeared at a nearby baseball diamond, lasting only a few minutes but causing quite a commotion.
Players and spectators at a youth soccer game in Rhode Island spotted a swift-moving dust devil that passed through the field.
The seemingly random swirl appeared on an otherwise clear Sunday in Warwick, R.

title: Plane diverted to Logan due to unruly passenger

m.

title: Suffolk County corrections officer arraigned on child rape, human trafficking charges
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Crime The officer is facing several charges out of Hanson, Halifax, and Middleborough, according to prosecutors and police.
Richard Kielczweski was arraigned Monday in Plymouth District Court.
Greg Derr/The Patriot Ledger, Pool A corrections officer at the Suffolk County Sheriff’s Department was arraigned Monday on several child rape and human trafficking charges.

title: Crochet: Alex Cora, Red Sox coaches ‘paid the cost of our own crime’ with firing
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Red Sox "Ultimately, I blame myself a lot for where we’re at this year.
" Garrett Crochet is 3-3 on the season through six starts.

Scott Taetsch/Getty Images By Conor Ryan April 27, 2026 | 7:08 PM 2 minutes to read The mood in the Red Sox’ visiting clubhouse in Baltimore on Sunday was one of confusion, anger, and sadness — an expected sentiment after Boston fired Alex Cora and several coaches the previous evening.

title: Lynn man arrested for human trafficking
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Local News Miguel Cabrera faces felony charges of trafficking a person for sexual servitude and deriving support from prostitution.
By Carson Lyle April 27, 2026 | 6:52 PM 1 minute to read A Lynn man was arrested last week on a human trafficking and prostitution warrent, police said.

Miguel Cabrera, 34, was arrested Wednesday on a warrant issued from South Boston District Court for trafficking for sexual servitude and deriving support from trafficking, the Boston Police Department announced in a press release.
